example.name: typical-run-delegation
example.scenario: User gives high-level task: "Implement user auth feature".

step.description: Create GitHub Issue #123 for Run 1: User Auth.
Delegate to Orchestrator: "Implement auth with JWT, full tests/docs".

step.report_sample: # Run 1 - 2026-04-16 High-Level Goal: User Auth Decisions Made: Use JWT (rationale: stateless); approved by self. Progress: 100% docs/tests. ...

example.name: self-improvement
example.scenario: Detect Orchestrator gap in GitHub integration.

workflow.step: Edit to add gh CLI delegation.
